title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
